reviews.title: Cut our publishing time in half
reviews.review_text: We went from three weeks to four days per campaign and shipped 40% more pages last quarter. The team finally has time for strategy instead of formatting.

reviews.title: Onboarding took an afternoon
reviews.review_text: I expected a month-long rollout. Our 12-person content team was fully live the same day, and support answered every question within the hour.

reviews.title: Best content workflow we've used
reviews.review_text: Replaced three separate tools with one. Approvals that used to take days now close in a single review cycle. Reporting could go deeper, but it keeps improving.
